title: deschampsia refracta subsp. gredensis
intro: Deschampsia refracta subsp. gredensis, also known as Mountain Hair Grass or Mountain Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Deschampsia refracta subsp. gredensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting immune function and providing antioxidant effects. Deschampsia refracta subsp. gredensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
